race.comment: PALAZZO DAMA (8) returned from a 38-week spell and was having her first run in the Browne stable when an encouraging third over this distance at Sale last start. Showed good gate speed that day and can use it again to spear across from gate six. Likely improver who can get off the mark this time. Speedy filly LIGHT FILLED (6) had a 40-day break before her last run, a tiring fourth over today's trip at Ballarat. Should lead and dictate terms. Strips fitter and this maiden looks a lot easier so she might take some running down. First starter LOVEDUP LOLA (11) finished third in a recent trial at Caulfield Heath for Anthony and Sam Freedman. Early betting suggests she has more than her share of talent. Four-year-old mare DAME DE LIBAN (4) steps out for the first time with plenty of recent jump-outs to her name, a placing at the most recent at Seymour. Betting watch advised. ZENITH ESPRIT (2) is another on debut who should be monitored for market support.
